Class Feedback

java.lang.Object
ecmwf.common.database.DataBaseObject
ecmwf.common.database.Feedback
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class Feedback extends DataBaseObject
The Class Feedback.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected String
    FBK_COMMENT
    Free-text comment.
    protected String
    FBK_COMPONENT
    Most-used component (Dissemination / Acquisition / Portal / Monitoring).
    protected String
    FBK_CONTACT
    Optional contact email for follow-up.
    protected Long
    FBK_ID
    Auto-increment primary key.
    protected String
    FBK_ONE_THING
    The one thing that would make OpenECPDS better.
    protected boolean
    FBK_QUOTE_OK
    Permission to quote comments anonymously in presentations/docs.
    protected Integer
    FBK_RATING
    Star rating 1–5.
    protected Boolean
    FBK_RECOMMEND
    Would recommend?
    protected boolean
    FBK_REVIEWED
    Whether an admin has reviewed this feedback entry.
    protected BigDecimal
    FBK_TIME
    Submission timestamp (millis since epoch).
    protected String
    FBK_USAGE
    How the user uses OpenECPDS (Evaluation / Production / Research / Other).
    protected String
    WEU_ID
    Web user login (null = anonymous).

      Would recommend? (null = no answer).
